rulings.Case Title: NORMA JEAN VINCENT VS. TOM CONLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-532209 WITH CASE CGC-12-525185
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 01, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANTs TOM CONLEY and AMORE REAL ESTATE INC.'s MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-532209 WITH CASE CGC-12-525185 Granted. No opposition filed. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. The lead case number is CGC-12-525185. This motion is granted without prejudice to parties seeking a trial continuance in Department 206.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CLINTON WILLIAMS et al VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 01, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued on the Court's own motion to December 6, 2013 to provide moving party an opportunity to provide the Court a courtesy copy of the operative pleading. Moving party is ordered to provide the Court with a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint by 4:00pm on November 15, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE LIEBERMAN FAMILY 2008 REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED VS. BRYANT EDWARDS LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action; Alternatively To Require Pltf To File Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 01, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT BRYANT EDWARDS LLC's Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action; Alternatively To Require Plaintiff To File Undertaking Granted. Plaintiff has not shown that a monetary award will not cover damages caused by the alleged encroachment by Defendant onto Plaintiff's property. Hearing required regarding attorneys' fees.= (501/REQ)
